'''鈭歬-ch-f''' ('''kakachaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrify|quadrify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrify|quadrify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-ch-f
|-
! Lemma
| kakachaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikachaf|thikachaf]] || [[word:jikachaf|jikachaf]] || [[word:shikachaf|shikachaf]] || [[word:kikachaf|kikachaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukachaf|thuthukachaf]] || [[word:jujukachaf|jujukachaf]] || [[word:shushukachaf|shushukachaf]] || [[word:kukukachaf|kukukachaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukachaf|thukachaf]] || [[word:jukachaf|jukachaf]] || [[word:shukachaf|shukachaf]] || [[word:kukachaf|kukachaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukachaf|thukachaf]] || [[word:jukachaf|jukachaf]] || [[word:shukachaf|shukachaf]] || [[word:kukachaf|kukachaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekachaf|thekachaf]] || [[word:jekachaf|jekachaf]] || [[word:shekachaf|shekachaf]] || [[word:kekachaf|kekachaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokachaf|thothokachaf]] || [[word:jojokachaf|jojokachaf]] || [[word:shoshokachaf|shoshokachaf]] || [[word:kokokachaf|kokokachaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokachaf|thokachaf]] || [[word:jokachaf|jokachaf]] || [[word:shokachaf|shokachaf]] || [[word:kokachaf|kokachaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokachaf|thokachaf]] || [[word:jokachaf|jokachaf]] || [[word:shokachaf|shokachaf]] || [[word:kokachaf|kokachaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kachaf|kachaf]] || [[word:kachaf|kachaf]] || [[word:kachaf|kachaf]] || [[word:kachaf|kachaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kachaf|kachaf]] || [[word:kachaf|kachaf]] || [[word:kachaf|kachaf]] || [[word:kachaf|kachaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kachaf|kachaf]] || [[word:kachaf|kachaf]] || [[word:kachaf|kachaf]] || [[word:kachaf|kachaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kachaf|kachaf]] || [[word:kachaf|kachaf]] || [[word:kachaf|kachaf]] || [[word:kachaf|kachaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kachaf|th忙kachaf]] || [[word:j忙kachaf|j忙kachaf]] || [[word:sh忙kachaf|sh忙kachaf]] || [[word:k忙kachaf|k忙kachaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakachaf|thathakachaf]] || [[word:jajakachaf|jajakachaf]] || [[word:shashakachaf|shashakachaf]] || [[word:kakakachaf|kakakachaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakachaf|thakachaf]] || [[word:jakachaf|jakachaf]] || [[word:shakachaf|shakachaf]] || [[word:kakachaf|kakachaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakachaf|thakachaf]] || [[word:jakachaf|jakachaf]] || [[word:shakachaf|shakachaf]] || [[word:kakachaf|kakachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakachaf|shakachaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakachaf|goshakachaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakachaf|gokishakachaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakachafn眉|shakachafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakachafnkn眉|goshakachafnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakachafn眉|gokishakachafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakachafsh毛|shakachafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakachafnksh毛|goshakachafnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakachafsh毛|gokishakachafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakachafro|shakachafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakachafnkro|goshakachafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakachafro|gokishakachafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakachafmu|shakachafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakachafnkmu|goshakachafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakachafmu|gokishakachafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakachafsher|shakachafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakachafnksher|goshakachafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakachafsher|gokishakachafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakachafng|shakachafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakachafnkng|goshakachafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakachafng|gokishakachafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakachafya|shakachafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakachafnkya|goshakachafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakachafya|gokishakachafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakachafyam|shakachafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakachafnkyam|goshakachafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakachafyam|gokishakachafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakachafn眉sh毛|shakachafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakachafnkn眉sh毛|goshakachafnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakachafn眉sh毛|gokishakachafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakachafn眉ro|shakachafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakachafnkn眉ro|goshakachafnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakachafn眉ro|gokishakachafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakachafn眉mu|shakachafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakachafnkn眉mu|goshakachafnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakachafn眉mu|gokishakachafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakachafsh毛n眉|shakachafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakachafnksh毛n眉|goshakachafnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakachafsh毛n眉|gokishakachafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakachafsh毛ro|shakachafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakachafnksh毛ro|goshakachafnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakachafsh毛ro|gokishakachafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakachafsh毛mu|shakachafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakachafnksh毛mu|goshakachafnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakachafsh毛mu|gokishakachafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakachafron眉|shakachafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakachafnkron眉|goshakachafnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakachafron眉|gokishakachafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakachafrosh毛|shakachafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakachafnkrosh毛|goshakachafnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakachafrosh毛|gokishakachafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakachafromu|shakachafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakachafnkromu|goshakachafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakachafromu|gokishakachafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakachafmun眉|shakachafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakachafnkmun眉|goshakachafnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakachafmun眉|gokishakachafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakachafmush毛|shakachafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakachafnkmush毛|goshakachafnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakachafmush毛|gokishakachafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakachafmuro|shakachafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakachafnkmuro|goshakachafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakachafmuro|gokishakachafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
